miami.today_forecast: Mostly Sunny then Scattered Showers And Thunderstorms

High near 91, with temperatures falling to around 86 in the afternoon. South wind 0 to 3 mph. Chance of precipitation is 80%. New rainfall amounts between a tenth and quarter of an inch possible.
